instructions.summary: Post to communities to drive waitlist signups — posts are written and ready
instructions.detail: VerdeDesk landing page is live at https://verdedesk.vercel.app. Goal: 50 waitlist signups to unlock the product backlog. All 4 posts are drafted and ready to copy-paste at .github/distribution/posts-2026-03-18.md
instructions.exact_action:
1. Post to Worktugal Slack (#freelancing or #tax-and-finance channel) — copy Post 3 from the file
2. Post to r/portugal — copy Post 1 from the file (best time: Tue-Thu 9-11am Lisbon)
3. Post to r/digitalnomad — copy Post 2 from the file
4. Post to Facebook expat groups — copy Post 4 from the file (post link in first comment, not in the post itself)

Full posts with posting notes: .github/distribution/posts-2026-03-18.md
instructions.unblocks: 50 waitlist signups → unlocks product backlog (FOUNDER-004 onward)
